_comment: COMMITTED MIRROR of the per-stack AgentStack claims (FU-048, docs/agents/agentstack.md; all three stacks migrated 2026-07-12). The CLUSTER claims are runtime-authoritative: coordinator-scan.sh reads `kubectl get agentstacks` merged over this file (cluster wins per stack name; verified on the reflex path 2026-07-12). This file persists for the two consumers a claim can't serve: (1) BUILD-TIME — agents-registration-lint's repo universe in CI, which has no cluster access (the ADR-085 static-catalog question, resolved as: keep the mirror); (2) the PROBE-FAILED belt when the cluster read fails. Keep entries in sync when a claim changes (generating this file FROM claims is FU-049's catalog problem). `mainRepo` is stack POLICY: the coordinator clones ALL `repos` into /work/<repo> and runs with its cwd in `mainRepo`. Defaults to "homelab".

stacks._chain_policy: Paid-cached-fast FIRST (agents/README.md model strategy + TICK-LOG meta-2): free tiers rate-limit to a crawl (~8 rpm) and slow models outlive the platform's freshness windows (hy3:free died to the 60-min git-token TTL, paid hy3 to pace/budget at 75+ min). Free tiers are scout-canary material (FU-062 M7), never fix-chain entries.
stacks._migrated: MIRROR of the claim in oracle-iac//oracle-fleet/agent/agentstack.yaml — the cluster claim wins at runtime; this entry serves the CI lint + the probe-failed belt (see _comment). Sync on claim changes.
stacks.name: oracle
